name: Machina Force
name_jp: マシンナーズ・フォース
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by "Commander Covington". You must pay 1000 LP to declare an attack with this card. You can send this card you control to the GY, then target 1 "Machina Soldier", "Machina Sniper", and "Machina Defender" in your GY; Special Summon those targets.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by "Commander Covington". You must pay 1000 LP to declare an attack with this card. You can send this card you control to the GY, then target 1 "Machina Soldier", "Machina Sniper", and "Machina Defender" in your GY; Special Summon those targets.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by "Commander Covington". You must pay 1000 LP to declare an attack with this card. You can send this card you control to the GY, then target 1 "Machina Soldier", "Machina Sniper", and "Machina Defender" in your GY; Special Summon those targets.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 3: Yugi's World Mega Pack

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Ignition
action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
attack: Must pay Life Points to attack
